intro: Festuca membranacea, also known as membranous fescue, is a type of grass that is native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The health benefits of Festuca membranacea include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections.
